top_signals.title: Green Book changes to drive investment in all parts of UK
top_signals.summary: Communities that have been under-invested in and overlooked for decades are now getting a fair hearing as the Chancellor pushes forward with her overhaul of how investment decisions are made by government.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Retail Payments Infrastructure Board launches consultation on the next generation UK payments infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Today marks a major milestone in the modernisation of the UK's payments landscape, with the Retail Payments Infrastructure Board (RPIB) launching a consultation on the future design of the UK's next-generation retail payments infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Remaining anchored: Monetary Policy in an unpredictable world - speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the Reykjavík Economic Conference 2026, Iceland
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Meta and SoftBank Expose Fault Lines in Growing Pile of AI Debt
top_signals.summary: Moves this week from Meta Platforms Inc. and SoftBank Group Corp. are exposing what buyers in the credit market have been saying for a while: beneath the surface, the booming AI world is turning into a tale of two extremes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Altman’s AI safety proposal: let us win, or everybody loses
top_signals.summary: A US-led world order would hand a big advantage to an American oligopoly that includes his own company
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A sea change in regulatory investigations and enforcement − speech by David Chaplin
top_signals.summary: Given at the 5th Conference on Financial Law and Regulation, University of Leeds School of Law, 24 June 2026

top_signals.title: Foreign investors scoop up half-year record $60bn in Japan stocks
Premier Lacrosse League plans to bring in team owners by 2028 'or soon thereafter,' co-founder says
top_signals.summary: Paul Rabil told CNBC he's banking on the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games, where lacrosse will return as an Olympic sport, to shine a spotlight on PLL.
